name: US Treasury bills
description: Short-term sovereign debt instruments issued by the US Department of the Treasury with maturities under one year.
custodian: Regulated custodian banks hold the underlying US Treasury bills.

name: US government money-market instruments
description: SEC Rule 2a-7 portfolio of short-duration US government securities, repurchase agreements and agency paper.
custodian: Registered money-market fund custodian banks hold the underlying instruments.

name: EU sovereign Treasury bills
description: Short-term sovereign debt issued by EU member states, primarily France and Germany.
custodian: UCITS custodians hold the underlying Treasury bills under Banque de France oversight.

name: US corporate credit obligations
description: Investment-grade and high-yield US corporate loans, bonds and credit facilities used as collateral in tokenised credit pools.
custodian: Institutional custodians and SPV trustees hold the underlying credit obligations.

name: LBMA Good Delivery gold
description: Allocated physical gold bars meeting LBMA Good Delivery standards stored in NYDFS-supervised vaults.
custodian: Paxos Trust Company custodies the underlying physical gold in Brink's vaults.

name: Allocated gold in Swiss vaults
description: Allocated physical gold held in Swiss vaults backing each XAUT token at one fine troy ounce per token.
custodian: Tether operates the Swiss vault that holds the underlying allocated gold.

name: LBMA Singapore allocated gold
description: Allocated physical gold (one gram per token) stored in LBMA-approved Singapore vaults.
custodian: Cache Global custodies the underlying gold in LBMA-approved Singapore vaults.

name: Institutionally custodied gold
description: Physical gold held in institutional custody under a regulated ETP structure backing tokenised gold products.
custodian: JPMorgan custodies the underlying physical gold for the WisdomTree ETP trustee.

name: Institutionally custodied silver
description: Physical silver held in institutional custody under a regulated ETP structure backing tokenised silver products.
custodian: JPMorgan custodies the underlying physical silver for the WisdomTree ETP trustee.

name: Verra VCS REDD+ carbon credits
description: Verified Verra VCS carbon offset credits representing avoided emissions from REDD+ forest conservation projects.
custodian: The Verra Registry holds the underlying carbon credits, bridged on-chain by Toucan Protocol.

name: Post-2012 Verra VCS nature carbon credits
description: Post-2012 nature-based Verra VCS carbon credits with stricter eligibility filters than the legacy Toucan BCT pool.
custodian: The Verra Registry holds the underlying nature-based carbon credits, bridged on-chain by Toucan Protocol.

name: Amazonian REDD+ carbon credits
description: Certified REDD+ carbon credits from Amazonian forest conservation projects, tokenised by Moss Earth.
custodian: The Verra Registry holds the underlying Amazonian REDD+ credits, bridged on-chain by Moss Earth.

name: US residential rental properties
description: Portfolios of US single-family and multi-unit rentals held in LLC special-purpose vehicles. Each token corresponds to a specific property or pool.
custodian: RealT, Landshare, and Lofty special-purpose vehicles hold the underlying rental properties.

name: UK and European real estate
description: Residential and commercial real estate in the UK and continental Europe held in Tangible Swiss SPVs and wrapped as NFTs.
custodian: Tangible operates the Swiss special-purpose vehicles that hold the underlying real estate.

name: US home equity lines of credit
description: Revolving credit facilities secured by equity in US residential properties, originated by Figure Technologies on Provenance Blockchain.
custodian: Figure Technologies originates and services the underlying HELOCs and records them on Provenance Blockchain.

name: Senior secured global credit pools
description: Diversified senior secured credit pools funding FinTech lenders in emerging markets via Goldfinch.
custodian: Goldfinch protocol SPVs hold the underlying credit positions.

name: Centrifuge real-world credit pool assets
description: Diversified pool of real-world credit assets including invoices, trade receivables and mortgages financed via Centrifuge issuer SPVs.
custodian: Centrifuge issuer SPVs hold the underlying credit pool assets.

name: Hamilton Lane senior credit portfolio
description: Diversified senior credit portfolio managed by Hamilton Lane and tokenised via Securitize as the SCOPE feeder fund.
custodian: Hamilton Lane operates the fund SPV that holds the underlying credit positions, with Securitize acting as transfer agent.

name: Apollo diversified credit portfolio
description: Diversified credit portfolio managed by Apollo Global Management and tokenised via Securitize as the ACRED feeder fund.
custodian: Apollo operates the fund SPV that holds the underlying credit positions, with Securitize acting as transfer agent.

name: Emerging-market trade finance receivables
description: Trade-finance receivables and SME loans originated in Brazil and Southeast Asia, tokenised via Credix.
custodian: Credix special-purpose vehicles hold the underlying trade-finance receivables.

name: AAA-rated CLO tranches
description: Senior AAA-rated tranches of collateralised loan obligations securitising portfolios of senior secured loans.
custodian: Multiple CLO managers and their trustees hold the underlying AAA-rated tranches.

name: iShares Core S&P 500 UCITS ETF
description: Shares of BlackRock's iShares Core S&P 500 UCITS ETF held by a Swiss custodian and wrapped as a tokenised certificate.
custodian: Backed Finance custodies the underlying ETF shares with a Swiss DLT Act-regulated broker.

name: iShares USD Treasury Bond 1–3yr UCITS ETF
description: Shares of BlackRock's iShares USD Treasury Bond 1–3yr UCITS ETF held by a Swiss custodian and wrapped as a tokenised certificate.
custodian: Backed Finance custodies the underlying ETF shares with a Swiss DLT Act-regulated broker.

name: NVIDIA common stock
description: NVIDIA common shares held in institutional custody by a Swiss broker, wrapped as a tokenised certificate.
custodian: Backed Finance custodies the underlying NVIDIA shares with a Swiss DLT Act-regulated broker.

name: Tesla common stock
description: Tesla common shares held by Swarm Markets' BaFin-regulated Swiss custodian and wrapped as a tokenised certificate.
custodian: Swarm Markets custodies the underlying Tesla shares with a BaFin-regulated broker.

name: KKR Health Care Strategic Growth Fund II LP interest
description: Limited partner interest in KKR's Health Care Strategic Growth Fund II, tokenised via Securitize on Avalanche.
custodian: The KKR Fund general partner holds the underlying LP interest, with Securitize acting as transfer agent.

name: US publicly listed equities and ETF shares
description: Common stock and ETF shares of publicly listed US issuers tokenised by Dinari, the first SEC-registered broker-dealer for on-chain US equities.
custodian: US registered broker-dealer custodians that are DTCC members hold the underlying equities and ETF shares.
